bio: I'm a BS Computer Science student working toward a career in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning. Over time
I've been building a strong foundation by learning Python

and machine learning through structured courses and practical projects. I enjoy applying what I learn to real-world problems and continuously expanding my technical skills through hands-on experience.
name: Hassam Ali
tagline: Building toward a career in Data Science and AI/ML through coursework and hands-on projects.
title: BS Computer Science student - Learning Data Science & AI/ML
